positions.title: Technical Executive - Web Developer
description: Developed and maintained 3 event-based web platforms for student registrations and event participation.
Built responsive and interactive user interfaces using TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion.
Integrated frontend applications with APIs to handle event registration workflows and payment-related functionality.

positions.title: Web Developer
description: Contributed as a Web Developer for Nexverse IITM and collaborated with the team during event and platform development activities.

positions.title: Web Developer
description: Developed a responsive web platform using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for a competitive event where participants recreated provided website designs within a timed challenge environment.
